headline: Rockwell Automation Declares Quarterly Dividend at $1.38 Per Share on Common Stock
summary: MILWAUKEE, April 14, 2026--The Board of Directors of Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK), following its regular review, today declared a quarterly dividend of $1.38 per share on its outstanding common stock, payable June 10, 2026, to shareowners of record at the close of business on May 18, 2026.

headline: Rockwell Automation: The Premiumization Is Unconvincing In 2026
summary: Rockwell Automation stock: I focus on valuation relative to the company's historical averages and why I consider the current valuation to be too expensive. Read the full analysis here.
